nasb.text: The inner court had a gate opposite the gate on the north as well as the gate on the east; and he measured a hundred cubits from gate to gate.

esv.text: And opposite the gate on the north, as on the east, was a gate to the inner court. And he measured from gate to gate, a hundred cubits.

cnv.text: 內院有門與這門相對；北面、東面，都是一樣；他從這門量到那門，共有五十公尺。

ccb.text: 内院的北门与外院的北门相对，正如它的东门和外院的东门相对，门与门之间的距离是五十米。
